FR-01.title: Member Registration
requirements: Register with personal info and fitness goals
acceptance_criteria: Member card generated with QR code

FR-02.title: Workout Tracking
requirements: Log exercises with sets, reps, and weight
acceptance_criteria: PR is updated when record broken

FR-03.title: Class Booking
requirements: View schedule of group fitness classes
Book spot in class with capacity limits
Cancel booking up to 2 hours before

FR-04.title: Personal Trainer Booking
requirements: Browse trainers with specialties and availability
Session reminders sent to both parties

FR-05.title: Nutrition and Meal Planning
requirements: Set daily calorie and macro targets
Log meals with food search database
Meal plan suggestions based on goals
acceptance_criteria: Food search returns accurate nutrition data

FR-06.title: Progress Photos and Measurements
requirements: Upload progress photos with date stamps
Log body measurements (weight, chest, waist, etc.)

FR-07.title: Membership Management
acceptance_criteria: Status shows correct plan and expiry

FR-08.title: Gym Admin Dashboard
requirements: View total members and active memberships

FR-01.title: Build Member Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/members/register (personal info, fitness goals, plan selection). Process payment. Generate unique member ID and QR code. Send welcome email with membership details.

FR-01.title: Build Registration Flow
FR-01.description: Create registration screens: personal info form, fitness goals selection (weight loss/muscle gain/general fitness), plan comparison cards with pricing, payment form, and confirmation with QR code.

FR-01.title: Create Members Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design members collection: id, name, email, phone, goals, plan_type, plan_start, plan_end, status (active/frozen/cancelled), member_id, qr_code_url, created_at.

FR-02.title: Build Workout Logging API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/workouts (date, exercises array with sets/reps/weight). GET /api/workouts (history with date filter). GET /api/exercises/records (personal records). Pre-built template CRUD.

FR-02.title: Build Workout Logger UI
FR-02.description: Create workout screen with exercise search, add sets with reps/weight inputs, rest timer, template selector, and save workout. History calendar with workout indicators. PR badges.

FR-03.title: Build Class Booking API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/classes/schedule (weekly view). POST /api/classes/:id/book (enforce capacity). DELETE /api/classes/:id/cancel (enforce 2h rule). POST /api/classes/:id/waitlist. Auto-promote from waitlist.

FR-03.title: Build Class Schedule UI
FR-03.description: Create weekly schedule grid with class cards (name, time, instructor, spots left). Book button. My bookings list. Waitlist indicator with position.

FR-04.title: Build Trainer Booking API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/trainers (list with specialties). GET /api/trainers/:id/availability. POST /api/sessions/book. Trainer endpoints: PATCH /api/trainers/schedule. Send reminders via push notification.

FR-04.title: Build Trainer Booking UI
FR-04.description: Create trainer browse with profile cards (photo, specialty, rating). Availability calendar on profile. Session booking flow with date/time selection and confirmation.

FR-05.title: Build Nutrition API
FR-05.description: Create PATCH /api/nutrition/targets (calories, protein, carbs, fat). POST /api/nutrition/meals (log with food items from database). GET /api/nutrition/daily (totals vs targets). Food search API.

FR-05.title: Build Nutrition Tracker UI
FR-05.description: Create nutrition screen with daily rings (calories, macros), meal log with food search autocomplete, add food with serving size, and daily summary showing remaining vs target.

FR-06.title: Build Progress Tracking API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/progress/photos (image upload with date). POST /api/progress/measurements (weight, chest, waist, arms, etc.). GET /api/progress/history. GET /api/progress/compare (two dates).

FR-06.title: Build Progress Screen
FR-06.description: Create progress page with photo grid, side-by-side comparison selector, measurement input form, and trend charts (line graphs for weight, measurements over time).

FR-07.title: Build Membership Management API
FR-07.description: Create GET /api/membership (current status). POST /api/membership/renew. POST /api/membership/upgrade. POST /api/membership/freeze (with duration). POST /api/membership/cancel (enforce notice).

FR-07.title: Build Membership Screen
FR-07.description: Create membership page showing plan name, status badge, expiry date, and action buttons: Renew, Upgrade (plan comparison), Freeze (duration selector), Cancel (notice period info).

FR-08.title: Build Admin Analytics API
FR-08.description: Create GET /api/admin/stats (total members, active, revenue). GET /api/admin/revenue (by plan type, monthly). GET /api/admin/attendance (class stats). CRUD for equipment maintenance.

FR-08.title: Build Admin Dashboard
FR-08.description: Create admin page with stat cards, revenue bar chart by plan, class attendance heat map, and equipment maintenance table with status and schedule dates.
